researched_category.notes: Slack is a workplace messaging and collaboration platform. Its API enables building bots, integrations, and AI agents.

one_liner.value: A workplace messaging and collaboration platform with a broad public REST API (Web API), OAuth 2.0 authentication, an official MCP server for AI agents, and self-serve developer credentials.

methods.notes: Primary auth is OAuth 2.0 (v2) which yields bearer tokens (bot tokens xoxb-, user tokens xoxp-). Docs state: 'Slack apps are installed with a v2 OAuth 2.0 flow' and tokens are sent as Bearer tokens in the Authorization header.

access.notes: Anyone with a Slack account can create apps and get API credentials for free. Slack's FAQ states: 'Yes. There are no charges to build apps that use the Slack API' (s6). Free workspace supports up to 10 app integrations. No paid plan required for basic API access. However, the MCP server endpoint (mcp.slack.com) restricts usage to directory-published or internal apps only (s5).

summary.value: Slack has a comprehensive public REST API (Web API) with 100+ methods covering messaging, channels, users, files, search, and admin functions. Also offers Events API (event streaming), Incoming/Outgoing Webhooks, Socket Mode, and the newer Real-Time Search (RTS) API. The Web API supports both URL-encoded and JSON POST bodies. Official SDKs exist for JavaScript, Python, Java, and a CLI tool.
summary.notes: API docs moved from api.slack.com to docs.slack.dev. Over 100 Web API methods documented.

agent_interface.notes: Slack ships an official MCP server (documented at docs.slack.dev/ai/slack-mcp-server) with endpoint mcp.slack.com/mcp. Multiple community MCP servers also exist (korotovsky/slack-mcp-server, zencoderai/slack-mcp-server, @ubie-oss/slack-mcp-server). Anthropic's reference implementation @modelcontextprotocol/server-slack is deprecated. Composio has a Slack toolkit with 85 tools and 8 triggers.

rationale.value: Slack is fully buildable as an agent toolkit today. It has a well-documented, broad public REST API (Web API) with 100+ methods, self-serve free credential access (create apps at api.slack.com with any Slack account), standard OAuth 2.0 authentication, official SDKs (JavaScript, Python, Java), and an official MCP server. The primary consideration is that the MCP server endpoint (mcp.slack.com/mcp) requires the backing app to be directory-published or internal-only, but the standard Web API has no such restriction. Rate limits apply equally across all plans. Composio already maintains a Slack toolkit with 85 tools.

s1.quote: Slack apps are installed with a v2 OAuth 2.0 flow.
s1.title: Installing with OAuth

s2.quote: When working with Slack apps or the Web API, you'll often need to send access tokens, also known as bearer tokens, along with inbound requests within the authorization header.
s2.title: oauth.v2.access method

s3.quote: The Slack Web API is an interface for querying information from and enacting change in a Slack workspace.
s3.title: Slack Web API

s4.quote: With the Slack MCP server, your integrated apps can search channels, send messages, and perform other Slack actions through MCP clients.
s4.title: Overview - Slack MCP Server

s5.quote: Only directory-published apps or internal apps may use MCP.
s5.title: Overview - Slack MCP Server

s6.quote: Yes. There are no charges to build apps that use the Slack API, and there are no Slack charges to install apps that use the Slack API.
s6.title: 4 Really Cool Things You Can Do With The Slack API

s7.quote: When creating an app for the first time, you'll be given your own user and bot token while going through the app creation process.
s7.title: Quickstart: Creating a Slack app

s8.quote: Integrations with other apps: Free - 10, Pro - ✓, Business+ - ✓, Enterprise+ - ✓
s8.title: Slack plans and features

s9.quote: Slack supports JSON-RPC 2.0 over Streamable HTTP. All requests should be sent to: https://mcp.slack.com/mcp
s9.title: Overview - Slack MCP Server

s10.quote: All Slack plans receive the same rate limit tier for each method.
s10.title: Rate limits

s11.quote: Free: A simpler way to chat and collaborate - €0 free forever
s11.title: Slack Pricing Plans

s12.quote: How do I authenticate my requests to Slack? When creating an app for the first time, you'll be given your own user and bot token while going through the app creation process.
s12.title: Slack developer FAQ

limitations: The Slack MCP server endpoint (mcp.slack.com/mcp) requires the backing Slack app to be directory-published or internal-only, which may be a gate for some use cases. However, the standard Web API has no such restriction and is fully usable for agent toolkits.
The free Slack workspace limits custom app installations to 10 per workspace, but this does not prevent developers from getting API credentials and building integrations.
Rate limits apply to all Web API methods, with tiers ranging from 1 to 100+ requests per minute, but these apply equally across all Slack plans.
